---
title: "Resume"
---

# Ethan Lew

![](images/IMG_6637.jpeg){width="375"}

## Business Administration – Marketing Management

California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Experience

## Summer Intern — Longo Toyota-Lexus / Penske Motor Group

*June 2025 – August 2025*

-   Marketing operations, customer relations, sales support, and service workflow exposure\
-   Cross-functional collaboration across dealership departments\
-   Presentation development with insights, recommendations, and business analysis\
-   Process shadowing across marketing, sales, service, and community relations

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Intramural Sports Official — ASI, Cal Poly Pomona

*September 2023 – September 2025*

-   Officiated competitive sports leagues (2–4 games/week, 12-team league)\
-   Fast decision-making, rule enforcement, and conflict resolution\
-   Communication with players, supervisors, and referees\
-   CPR/AED certified (Professional Rescuer, First Aid, Bloodborne Pathogens)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Crew Member — McDonald’s, La Puente

*May 2022 – Present*

-   Customer service (200+ customers/day) in high-volume environment\
-   POS systems, cash handling, mobile & card transactions\
-   Team operations, speed-of-service optimization\
-   Customer issue resolution and service quality management

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Education

## California State Polytechnic University, Pomona

*August 2023 – Present*

B.S. Business Administration — Marketing Management\
Focus: Sports Marketing, Consumer Behavior, Marketing Analytics

## West Covina High School

*August 2019 – June 2023*

High School Diploma

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Certifications

-   CPR/AED for Professional Rescuers\
-   First Aid & Bloodborne Pathogens Training

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Skills

-   Sports Marketing\
-   Marketing Analytics\
-   Customer Experience (CX)\
-   Brand Engagement\
-   Data-Driven Decision Making\
-   Consumer Behavior
-   Team Leadership\
-   Communication & Conflict Resolution
-   Operations Support
-   POS Systems

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Career Interests

-   Sports Marketing\
-   Brand Management\
-   Marketing Analytics\
-   Fan Engagement Strategy
